prompt: Create a cinematic portrait poster featuring a young woman centered in the foreground from chest up, wearing a fitted black long-sleeve top and delicate layered silver necklaces. The subject has long dark brown hair parted in the middle and styled into two loose braids, with soft studio lighting and a subtle warm rim light around the hair and shoulders. Behind the subject, fill the entire background with an enormous close-up black-and-white photograph of a human face focused on one large eye, eyebrow, eyelashes, and partial nose bridge, cropped dramatically so the eye sits on the right side of the frame and dark hair frames the edges. Use a moody monochrome backdrop with the foreground subject in muted natural color, high contrast, shallow depth of field, editorial fashion poster composition, 16:9 horizontal aspect ratio, realistic photography, clean modern aesthetic, no text, no logos. Add a soft rectangular overlay area on the left side as a muted gray-brown block and a smaller warm skin-tone rectangular overlay covering the subject's face, creating an anonymized poster mockup look.
